movies.name: Super Mario Galaxy Movie
movies.notes: AI Velocity sits at ~95 with social velocity peaking near 98; Pulse Shift is the highest on the movie board as nostalgia, soundtrack remixes, and speedrun memes flood TikTok. Alpha Delta ~2.0 confirms this is not a flash spike but a sustained cross-platform hype regime.

movies.name: Avengers: Doomsday
movies.notes: Phase-ending Marvel event film; Alpha Delta near 1.9 is driven by leak-prone set photos and multiverse speculation. Pulse Shift is strong but a step behind Mario as trailer rewatch loops plateau into a steadier franchise chatter pattern.

movies.name: Dune: Part Three
movies.notes: Robert Pattinson joining Zendaya and Timothee Chalamet fuels one of the strongest ensemble narratives in the index. Elevated Pulse Shift and Alpha Delta show that IMAX attendance threads, lore breakdowns, and awards speculation are all compounding velocity.

movies.name: Avatar: Fire and Ash
movies.notes: James Cameron’s eco-war sequel maintains a wide but smoother hype curve; interest is less spiky than peers. Positive but moderate Pulse Shift and mid-range Alpha Delta indicate a long-duration event profile rather than short-term volatility.

movies.name: Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow
movies.notes: Milly Alcock’s casting flipped this from niche curiosity to breakout DC anchor, driving a massive +18 jump vs. the March 31 Human Hype baseline. One of the strongest Pulse Shift and Alpha Delta combinations in the index marks rapid discovery beyond core comic fandom.

movies.name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
movies.notes: Game-to-film skepticism is giving way to optimism as concept art leaks align with fan expectations. Pulse Shift above 4.0 and an Alpha Delta near 1.8 show recommendation engines aggressively surfacing Zelda content beyond the core Nintendo audience.

movies.name: Spider-Man: Beyond the Web
movies.notes: Tom Holland’s return plus cross-over rumors with the animated Spider-Verse keep velocity elevated. Solid Pulse Shift and Alpha Delta signal robust franchise demand without the shock factor of a brand-new IP.

movies.name: The Batman: Crimson Dawn
movies.notes: Matt Reeves and Robert Pattinson reunite for a darker detective story, and the new teaser is over-performing. Elevated Pulse Shift shows strong week-on-week momentum, while Alpha Delta confirms cross-pollination with Dune: Part Three discourse.

movies.name: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 4
movies.notes: Post-trilogy continuation divides fans, with some fatigue visible in comment sentiment. Slight negative Change and only mild Pulse Shift indicate that evergreen affection is being challenged by the perception that the emotional arc already peaked.

movies.name: Fantastic Four: Quantum Storm
movies.notes: Casting confirmations and on-set photos stabilize a narrative that had been rumor-dominated for months. Pulse Shift is comfortably positive while Alpha Delta shows recommendation systems pushing fan-theory content to a broader MCU audience.

actors.name: Zendaya
actors.notes: Sits atop the actor index as Dune: Part Three promo, fashion campaigns, and music collaborations intersect. Social velocity near 88 with a strong Pulse Shift shows her spanning both prestige and stan-culture ecosystems.

actors.name: Robert Pattinson
actors.notes: Dual exposure in Dune: Part Three and The Batman: Crimson Dawn rockets him into the #2 slot with a +7 jump. High Pulse Shift and Alpha Delta indicate algorithms heavily co-recommending his catalog across sci-fi and noir content.

directors.name: Christopher Nolan
directors.notes: Holds slot as IMAX lockout builds.
